scripts.dev: concurrently -n ephem,server,client -c magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev:ephemeris" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start: cd ephemeris-service && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --port 8000 & cd server && npm start
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../ephemeris-service && python -m venv .venv && node ../scripts/install-python-deps.js
